ddls:
CREATE TABLE "news_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the news source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the news source */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the news source */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the news source was founded */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the news source */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the news source's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news source that published the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the article */,
  "read_time" TEXT /* Estimated read time of the article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the main image associated with the article */,
  "is_breaking_news" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is breaking news */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the article was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES news_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is the primary category for the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leanings" (
  "leaning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaning */,
  "leaning_name" TEXT /* Name of the leaning */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the leaning */,
  "parent_leaning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent leaning */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the leaning is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articleLeanings" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "leaning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaning */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the leaning is the primary leaning for the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "leaning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (in seconds) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment */,
  "sentiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment */,
  "parent_sentiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sentiment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sentiment is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_sentiments" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sentiment is the primary sentiment for the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bias_scores" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news source */,
  "bias_score" REAL /* Bias score of the news source */,
  "last_calculated" TEXT /* Date and time when the bias score was last calculated */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used to calculate the bias score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
